alchemist-bench.name: an alchemist's bench
alchemist-bench.description: Glass coils and a cold burner await reagents.

forge.name: a smith's forge
forge.description: A banked coal forge with anvil and tongs, warm against the abyssal chill.

lamp.name: an iron lamp
lamp.description: A heavy iron lamp bolted to the rock above the shaft, fed by a slow reservoir of oil. A lever on its side turns the flame up or down — a last light before the descent.
